training_status: Active boxer, golfer, and gym goer

benefits.description: 95% recovery from tennis elbow (lateral epicondylitis) after 2 weeks; went from 7/10 pain when lifting a coffee flask to only minor tweak when gripping a golf club

side_effects.description: No side effects reported by OP

protocol_notes: Local sub-q injections near site of pain; started on forearm just above flexor, later shifted to medial head of tricep as pain cleared. Continued reduced-volume gym training, boxing once/week, golf twice/week during protocol. Also continued ice daily and theragun as needed. Sourced from UK Peptides. Plans to try local injection in left trap next.
